cases.prompt: Set up Microsoft Agent 365 to manage all our AI agents at scale.

expect.label: organise work into observe, govern, and secure pillars
build a single agent inventory via the agent registry
give each agent a managed Entra Agent ID, not a shared app
secure agent data with Microsoft Purview (DSPM for AI, DLP)
detect unsafe behaviour at runtime with Microsoft Defender

cases.prompt: How do I govern and secure third-party and Copilot Studio agents from one control plane?

expect.label: treat every agent as a governed least-privilege identity
require security review before tenant-wide publish
fix the data estate first because agents amplify gaps
retire ownerless or low-value agents on a cadence
